india_trends.title: Markets have begun to climb the wall of worry
india_trends.summary: Markets often climb despite worries. In 2020, markets rose before economic recovery. Now, in 2026, markets are recovering amid geopolitical tensions. india_trends.title: Sebi plans risk-based calculation for brokers’ variable net worth
india_trends.summary: In a groundbreaking initiative, the Securities and Exchange Board of India is set to revamp the variable net worth calculation method for stockbrokers. This reform is designed to align capital adequacy with the actual risks of their operations and the size of their client pool.

india_trends.title: Sumitomo Mitsui infuses Rs 1,075 cr into NBFC arm
india_trends.summary: Japanese conglomerate Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group has injected ₹1,075 crore into its Indian arm, SMFG India Credit.
